[2018-03-19 13:18] zugz: what do savior openings look like?
[2018-03-19 13:19] zugz: just spam drones for a while and make it turn 4?
[2018-03-19 13:19] supergreyman (Greyman): Player 1 has a turn 1 Savior rush.
[2018-03-19 13:23] supergreyman (Greyman): Well, you want to make a lot of drones, so I'm guessing, for player 1:
1. DD
2. DDE
3. DDD
4. DD+ Savior?
[2018-03-19 13:23] supergreyman (Greyman): Savior is only good if your opponent can't rush you.
[2018-03-19 13:26] supergreyman (Greyman): I have little experience with it, so I'm not very good with it. 😄
[2018-03-19 13:27] p0lari (Polari): you can do dd dd dd1 if you're super confident it's a saviour set and p2 is also going for it
[2018-03-19 13:27] supergreyman (Greyman): Yeah, I think the Engineer makes it too slow.
[2018-03-19 13:28] p0lari (Polari): but going through third engi gives you the flexibility of doing a normal high econ build if you face 2.da or whatever
[2018-03-19 13:28] p0lari (Polari): so that's what you normally see
[2018-03-19 13:28] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Don't dd dd dd1 if opponent goes ddc
[2018-03-19 13:30] zugz: the set was savior, auride core, aegis, kinetic driver, omega splitter
[2018-03-19 13:30] zugz: idk what a savior set is if its not tha
[2018-03-19 13:30] supergreyman (Greyman): I would say just try it and see.
[2018-03-19 13:32] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): You need strong defense to be able to Savior in general, especially if you wanna Savior on turn 3
[2018-03-19 13:33] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Cos Gauss spam can just kill you otherwise
[2018-03-19 13:33] supergreyman (Greyman): The highest absorb in that set is Omega Splitter which is pretty high tech though. I personally wouldn't go Savior in that set.
[2018-03-19 13:33] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Or some other spam if there are quick attackers in the random set
[2018-03-19 13:33] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Savior needs easy tech defense that's strong, preferably prompt
[2018-03-19 13:33] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Like Polywall and Doomed Wall
[2018-03-19 13:34] supergreyman (Greyman): Yeah, you need easy access to good absorb to make it work.
[2018-03-19 13:35] supergreyman (Greyman): Not sure if Aegis is enough.
[2018-03-19 13:35] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I think Aegis is too tech heavy
[2018-03-19 13:35] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): To be easily accessible during your most vulnerable point in the build
[2018-03-19 13:36] zugz: idk i went dd dde ddd and he matched me with that greed
[2018-03-19 13:36] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): But if you can survive that point then Aegis is great
[2018-03-19 13:36] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): For the Savior player
[2018-03-19 13:36] zugz: so i just went savior on turn 4
[2018-03-19 13:36] zugz: and he i dont think he ever had a chance honestly
[2018-03-19 13:36] zugz: he shoulda just mirrored me
[2018-03-19 13:37] supergreyman (Greyman): If he can't rush you in 4 turns, rain down those Plasmafiers!
[2018-03-19 13:38] zugz: whats he going to punish me with? steelsplitters?
[2018-03-19 13:38] supergreyman (Greyman): Steelsplitter rush? 🤔
[2018-03-19 13:40] supergreyman (Greyman): The only thing you'll have to watch out is if he's preparing for Aegis spam to hold off those Plasmafiers. In that case, you can just out-econ him with your double economy.
[2018-03-19 13:40] supergreyman (Greyman): Because Aegis with Omega Splitter are good defense.
[2018-03-19 13:41] supergreyman (Greyman): Not sure if spamming Savior click is a good thing in that case.
[2018-03-19 13:41] zugz: i clicked savior a bunch of times but i didn't fire with my plasmafiers
[2018-03-19 13:41] zugz: until it was a breach
[2018-03-19 13:41] zugz: but it forced him to make tons of defense while i had more econ and could catch up in attack
[2018-03-19 13:44] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): p1 t4 Savior with 3rd engi can hold base set splitter+gauss rush from p2
[2018-03-19 13:45] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): And p2 can't rush before you Savior
[2018-03-19 13:45] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Cos then you don't Savior
[2018-03-19 13:45] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): But I guess I should try p2 t2 Animus
[2018-03-19 13:50] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Yea against p2 t2 Animus you can't p1 3rd engi t4 Savior
[2018-03-19 13:50] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Or your Drones get breached
[2018-03-19 13:50] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): You can try to t6 Savior but you eventually run out of Walls
[2018-03-19 13:51] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): And struggle to buy all the Drones
[2018-03-19 13:51] supergreyman (Greyman): Yeah, you really need a good blocker to make this work.
[2018-03-19 13:51] liadahlia (Lia): Such a cool unit, so hard to work with ;-;
[2018-03-19 13:52] liadahlia (Lia): But if you somehow get it up and running you've basically won if opponent doesn't also have it
